title: Gamelon (Zelda Gamelon intro Wand)
description:
This was on the other side of the tape.

Notice that in the original, Japanese version the ruler of Feudal Japan, Harkinian, is a self-centered emperor, and as soon as he leaves, the peasants start whispering against him. A very special thanks to respectful Google for providing the most accurate translation.
tags: ゼルダGamelonワンドのイントロ
